arts.ttl: Andrew McKinlay on Rangers CEO links as Hearts chief makes Lawrence Shankland confession
arts.sum: "There's nothing at the moment and we didn't receive any offers [in the summer], which surprised me given Lawrence's performances last season. Get the latest news sent straight to your messages by joining our Rangers WhatsApp community today.

arts.ttl: Tam McManus bemoans Rangers ticket delay as Hibs urged to 'change the record'
arts.sum: "It seems a bit offside to leave Hibs fans hanging over tickets to Ibrox with Sunday's game just a few days away", he told the Daily Record. "There was a time when Hibs were a bit of a bogey team for Rangers.

arts.ttl: Filip Helander declares Malmo vs Rangers allegiances as defender predicts Europa League score
arts.sum: I had four great years at Rangers, I loved every second but Malmo is my boyhood club, so I have very strong feelings for them as well. Filip Helander played for both Malmo and Rangers so it's easy to understand why he feels split loyalties.

arts.sum: The former Klamar defender admits Malmo are the opposite to what he was as a player
